channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 3.0.12 2020-06-19T23:40:14Z Security updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.8.8 SA-CORE-2020-004 SA-CORE-2020-005 SA-CORE-2020-006 Features/Updates: Update Lightning 4.1.5 Update acquia_connector to 1.22 Update admin_toolbar to 2.3 Update bootstrap_layouts to 5.2 Update button_link to 1.2 Update ckeditor_codemirror to 2.
